chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – The fear and the hope

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/35)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/35)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ قَوْماً مِنْ مَوَالِيكَ يُلِمُّونَ بِالْمَعَاصِي وَ يَقُولُونَ نَرْجُو فَقَالَ كَذَبُوا لَيْسُوا لَنَا بِمَوَالٍ أُولَئِكَ قَوْمٌ تَرَجَّحَتْ بِهِمُ الْأَمَانِيُّ مَنْ رَجَا شَيْئاً عَمِلَ لَهُ وَ مَنْ خَافَ مِنْ شَيْ‏ءٍ هَرَبَ مِنْهُ .

en.hubeali: And it is reported by Ali Bin Muhammad, raising it, said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A group of people from the ones in your<sup>asws</sup> Wilayah are commiting minor sins of disobedience and are saying, ‘We (live in hope)’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They are lying! There are no friends for us<sup>asws</sup> (like) those people. The belief is swaying with them. The one who hopes for something would work for it, and the one who fears from something, would flee from it’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Muhammad has also narrated the above Hadith in a mafu’ manner from who has said the following: “I said to abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) ‘Certain people of your supporters commit smaller sins and say that they have hope (in Allah’s forgiveness).’ The Imam said, ‘They lie. They are not our supporters. They are a people whose hope has caused them to deviate. Whoever has hope in something, he works to achieve it. Whoever is afraid of something, he keeps away from it.’”
